raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":1.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.7,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.4","R1.7","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"Positioning against prior work centrally involves reshaping the contribution and gap statement at the level of the paper's claimed design-space contribution.","R1.4":"The delegation is load-bearing on estimating how AgentFlow differs from the nearest relevant prior systems and whether the claimed delta is defensible.","R1.7":"Prior-work positioning requires attention to whether the relevant literature categories are covered and attributed accurately, even if a full scholarship audit is not explicitly requested.","RX.1":"Uncertainty must be disclosed because the artifact names broad research areas but does not identify specific prior systems or citations.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is active because phrases such as previously unaddressed and no prior system require careful qualification.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is active because the task is only to project responsibility, not to rewrite or evaluate the artifact itself.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is active to avoid unsupported novelty claims that could mislead readers or reviewers.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability is active because any positioning responsibility depends on tracing claims to identifiable prior-work lines and reported artifact content."}}

rationale.R1.1: Positioning against prior work centrally involves reshaping the contribution and gap statement at the level of the paper's claimed design-space contribution.
rationale.R1.4: The delegation is load-bearing on estimating how AgentFlow differs from the nearest relevant prior systems and whether the claimed delta is defensible.
rationale.R1.7: Prior-work positioning requires attention to whether the relevant literature categories are covered and attributed accurately, even if a full scholarship audit is not explicitly requested.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty must be disclosed because the artifact names broad research areas but does not identify specific prior systems or citations.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is active because phrases such as previously unaddressed and no prior system require careful qualification.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is active because the task is only to project responsibility, not to rewrite or evaluate the artifact itself.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is active to avoid unsupported novelty claims that could mislead readers or reviewers.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is active because any positioning responsibility depends on tracing claims to identifiable prior-work lines and reported artifact content.
